drift_analysis.finding: Humidity drift is NON-MONOTONIC — peaked at 98.1% then receded to 97.9%. Linear drift model (C558) is an oversimplification. DHT22 sensor exhibits oscillation around a slowly shifting baseline, consistent with known capacitive humidity sensor behavior under stable environmental conditions.
